notes: Outcome milestone #14 — Agent reachable on 2+ non-web channels; due 2026-06-30.
Epic #464. Hard deadline: WA business verification submitted 2026-05-10; outcome 2026-06-30.
SessionKeyValidator.sol is audit-bundled with the RWA epic (shared contract freeze 2026-05-30, audit firm engaged 2026-05-15).
SMS-only fallback is ready to ship from Phase 1.3 if WA verification slips (1–3 week Meta lead time).
No indexer changes — messaging state is off-chain per spec and CLAUDE.md indexer boundary.
Branch strategy: feature/agent-messaging-channels with phase commits for independent rollback.
Afo deferred this out of active product work on 2026-04-26 because May is not planned for large product implementation after the current closeout set.
Agent package hardening completed and archived on 2026-05-04; no longer listed as an open feature dependency.
Agent PostHog Observability completed and archived on 2026-05-10; routine telemetry remains available as completed prerequisite context, not an open feature dependency.

contracts.handoff_note: Phase 2.1 — SessionKeyValidator.sol (scoped per-user target + selector allowlist + expiry + revoke). Audit-bundled with RWA epic; contract freeze 2026-05-30.

qa_pass_2.handoff_note: Re-run SessionKeyValidator fuzz, rate-limit concurrency, revoke-path invariant, PII-hygiene grep.

history.note: Hub created from superpowers spec + plan. Epic #464; outcome milestone #14. Decisions locked: Twilio provider, tier-Y capability, ERC-4337 session keys, 30d TTL, dual revoke path.
